description_long: This is a medium-sized, muscular dog with a short, angular body and a pronounced, blocky head. Its coat is predominantly dark, with patches of reddish-brown and lighter areas suggesting a rough, weathered texture. The ears are sharply pointed and stand erect, giving the dog an alert and attentive appearance. The legs are straight and sturdy, with visible joints and a somewhat stylized, polygonal form. The tail is straight and held low, extending from the back in a relaxed manner. The overall look is reminiscent of a guard or working dog, with a rugged, urban-worn appearance.
description: A muscular, dark-coated dog with pointed ears, angular features, and a weathered, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dog's pointed ears, blocky head, and straight legs, emphasizing its alert posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dog's angular body, straight tail, and visible reddish-brown patches on the coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the narrow back, straight tail, and the symmetry of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular build, pointed ears, and the dog's open mouth.
